article.title: Uber interview help
article.content:
Hi I have my uber sde 2 interview coming in a few days, can anyone please share list of lld and hld questions asked in uber and Frequently asked coding questions. I am having interview for role Software Engineer - iOS Role.

Also if you can share some resources for system deisgn preparation that would be great.

Thanks.

post.content: hello, i have received OA of uber for SDE-1 position. and i think you\'ve passed the round 1. if you can help me in what type of questions did that ask in hacker-rank that\'ll really helpful to me to crack the first round of UBER.
